calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
David Finkelstein, Esq., for Plaintiff: Silver Park Apartments, LLC.
No appearance by the Defendants: James Dunkerson and Willet Berts.
09:20 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Patrick Spears and Leo Martinez were sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement dtd. 10-14-03-------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice to pay or quit dtd. 12-19-03---- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at: 901 Bayshore, #206, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $4,968.54
Attorney's Fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $441.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits and to prepare Judgment.

May 11, 2004 - 3:00 p.m.
Judgment received and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
David Finkelstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Silver Park Apartments, LLC., present by Patrick Spiers and James Keith, the property managers.
Co-Defendant: Willette Berts present in pro per.
No appearance by Defendant: James Dunkerson (in hospital).
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Plaintiff to prepare stipulation and to present to Defendants for their signatures.
Plaintiff to call Dept. 206 to take off TRIAL CALENDAR as soon as Stipulation is signed by all parties.
This matter is off the Settlement Conference calendar.

Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT JAMES DUNKERSON and WILLETTE BERTS' Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 03/18/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
